categories.description: Your payment was successfully captured. Includes payment number, amount, currency, invoice reference, receipt URL, and payment method summary (brand + last4).
categories.audience: customer (user or athlete's guardian) + tenant_owner + tenant_admin

categories.description: Your payment could not be processed. Includes error reason (customer-friendly translation of the provider error code), the amount that was attempted, and a Try Again CTA linking back to the invoice.

Your payment needs additional verification (3DS2 / bank challenge). Includes a link to complete the step-up flow via the provider SDK. Time-sensitive — the customer must complete before the intent times out.
Your saved payment method (card ending in {last4}) expires in {days} days. Update it now to avoid interrupted service. 30-day and 7-day pre-expiry notifications.
A new payment method was saved to your account. Includes brand + last4 + expiry summary. Audit-trail notification — the customer should confirm they added it.
A customer has opened a dispute against a payment. Includes payment reference, disputed amount, reason, and evidence submission deadline. High-value disputes (> $500 configurable) fire as P1.
The evidence submission deadline for a payment dispute is approaching (3 days out). Includes a link to review + submit the auto-collected evidence pack.
You successfully defended a payment dispute. Funds have been returned. Includes payment reference and dispute summary.

A payment dispute was decided in the customer's favour. Funds have been permanently reversed. Includes payment reference, amount, and next-step guidance (the dispute has been escalated to a Chargeback via the chargeback module).

A payment provider (Stripe / Paddle / Adyen / etc.) has been marked unreachable after N consecutive failures. Payment captures against this provider are paused until the breaker auto-resets or ops manually resets it. Includes provider name, last error, open-until timestamp, and reset instructions.

Nightly reconciliation found intents where our record does not match the provider record. Detail includes drift count + affected intents. Signal for support to investigate lost webhooks or async completions.
